title: Paraprasophyllum calcicola
intro: There is not enough information available about Paraprasophyllum calcicola to write a comprehensive paragraph.
taxonomy: Paraprasophyllum calcicola is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is further categorized as a member of the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Diurideae. Within the genus Paraprasophyllum, it is assigned the species name calcicola. The classification of this plant is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics. As a result, Paraprasophyllum calcicola is placed within the taxonomic hierarchy as Paraprasophyllum calcicola, Orchidaceae, Orchidoideae, Diurideae.
uses: I couldn't find any information on the medicinal uses of Paraprasophyllum calcicola.
